title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source command-line tool that enables rapid building and deployment of AI agents to production. It provides agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails for production-grade AI agent systems.
writeup: This video covers Google's Agents CLI, an open-source command-line tool for building and deploying AI agents to production, paired with skills to streamline the workflow. It matters because the tool targets production-grade concerns rather than prototypes. The concrete takeaways: the CLI provides agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails for deployments.
